---
title: false
pagetitle: "Mesfin Genie | Health Economist"
page-layout: full
description: "Mesfin Genie is a Senior Lecturer in Health Economics at the University of Newcastle, specialising in health preferences, choice modelling and public health policy."
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<main id="main-content">
<section class="hero" aria-labelledby="hero-title">
  <div class="page-shell hero-grid">
    <div class="portrait-shell reveal">
      <img src="/assets/mesfin-genie-profile.webp" class="profile-photo" alt="Portrait of Mesfin Genie" width="900" height="900" fetchpriority="high">
    </div>
    <div class="hero-content reveal">
      <div class="availability-pill"><span aria-hidden="true"></span> Open to collaboration</div>
      <h1 id="hero-title">Mesfin Genie</h1>
      <div class="hero-role">Senior Lecturer in Health Economics</div>
      <div class="hero-affiliation">Newcastle Business School · The University of Newcastle</div>
      <p class="hero-value">I produce policy-ready evidence on how patients and the public value healthcare, process complex information and respond to public-health interventions.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a class="button-primary" href="/publications/">View publications</a>
        <a class="button-secondary" href="/cv/">Curriculum vitae</a>
      </div>
      <div class="social-row" aria-label="Academic and professional profiles"><a class="social-link" href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie" aria-label="University profile" title="University profile" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 10.5 12 5l9 5.5v1.7H3zM5 14h2v5H5zm4 0h2v5H9zm4 0h2v5h-2zm4 0h2v5h-2zM3 21h18v2H3z"/></svg></a><a class="social-link" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&amp;hl=en" aria-label="Google Scholar" title="Google Scholar" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 3 10 5-10 5L2 8zm-6 8.5V17c2.8 2.7 9.2 2.7 12 0v-5.5L12 14z"/></svg></a><a class="social-link" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1744-4666" aria-label="ORCID" title="ORCID" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M8.1 7.7h1.5v1.5H8.1zm0 3h1.5v5.6H8.1zm3.1 0h2.3c2.1 0 3.4 1.2 3.4 2.8s-1.3 2.8-3.4 2.8h-2.3zm1.5 1.2v3.2h.8c1.2 0 1.9-.6 1.9-1.6s-.7-1.6-1.9-1.6z"/></svg></a><a class="social-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mesfin-Genie" aria-label="ResearchGate" title="ResearchGate" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 5h6.2c3 0 4.8 1.5 4.8 4 0 1.8-.8 3.1-2.2 3.7L17 19h-3l-2.8-5.6H8V19H5zm3 2.5v3.6h3c1.3 0 2-.6 2-1.8s-.7-1.8-2-1.8zm10-2h1.7V8H18z"/></svg></a><a class="social-link" href="https://au.linkedin.com/in/mesfin-genie-ph-d-65634216" aria-label="LinkedIn" title="LinkedIn" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 4.5A1.8 1.8 0 1 1 5 8a1.8 1.8 0 0 1 0-3.5M3.5 9.5h3V20h-3zm5 0h2.9v1.4h.1c.8-1.1 2-1.8 3.7-1.8 3 0 4.3 1.9 4.3 5.2V20h-3v-5.1c0-1.7-.5-2.9-2.2-2.9-1.8 0-2.8 1.2-2.8 3.4V20h-3z"/></svg></a><a class="social-link" href="https://github.com/DrGenie" aria-label="GitHub" title="GitHub" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 2a10 10 0 0 0-3.2 19.5c.5.1.7-.2.7-.5v-2c-2.8.6-3.4-1.2-3.4-1.2-.5-1.2-1.1-1.5-1.1-1.5-.9-.6.1-.6.1-.6 1 .1 1.6 1 1.6 1 .9 1.6 2.4 1.1 2.9.8.1-.7.4-1.1.7-1.4-2.2-.3-4.6-1.1-4.6-5A3.9 3.9 0 0 1 7.8 8c-.1-.3-.5-1.3.1-2.7 0 0 .9-.3 2.8 1a9.6 9.6 0 0 1 5.1 0c2-1.3 2.8-1 2.8-1 .6 1.4.2 2.4.1 2.7a3.9 3.9 0 0 1 1 2.7c0 3.9-2.4 4.8-4.6 5 .4.3.7.9.7 1.8V21c0 .3.2.6.7.5A10 10 0 0 0 12 2"/></svg></a><a class="social-link" href="https://x.com/mesfin_genie" aria-label="X" title="X" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 4h3.5l4.1 5.5L17.2 4H19l-5.6 6.7L20 20h-3.5l-4.6-6.2L6.8 20H5l6-7.4z"/></svg></a><a class="social-link" href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au" aria-label="Email" title="Email"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 5h18v14H3zm2 2v.4l7 5.1 7-5.1V7zm14 10V9.8l-7 5.1-7-5.1V17z"/></svg></a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="credibility-band" aria-label="Research profile">
  <div class="page-shell credibility-grid">
    <a class="credibility-item" href="/publications/"><strong id="output-count">44</strong><span>listed research outputs</span></a>
    <a class="credibility-item" href="https://www.grants.gov.au/Ga/Show/57849742-1674-4b10-b75a-47d575e5d430" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><strong>A$4.754m</strong><span>MRFF MandEval programme</span></a>
    <a class="credibility-item" href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie#career" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><strong>4 countries</strong><span>academic appointments</span></a>
    <a class="credibility-item" href="/tools/"><strong>2 live tools</strong><span>decision support and evaluation</span></a>
  </div>
  <div class="page-shell scholar-band" id="scholar-band" hidden aria-live="polite">
    <span class="scholar-label">Google Scholar</span>
    <span><strong id="scholar-citations"></strong> citations</span>
    <span>h-index <strong id="scholar-hindex"></strong></span>
    <span>i10-index <strong id="scholar-i10"></strong></span>
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Profile ↗</a>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section" aria-labelledby="research-heading">
  <div class="page-shell">
    <div class="section-heading-row"><h2 id="research-heading">Research</h2><a class="text-link" href="/research/">Research programme →</a></div>
    <div class="research-strip">
      <article class="research-card reveal"><h3>Health preferences and choice modelling</h3><p>Patient and public preferences, discrete choice experiments, preference heterogeneity, equity and value assessment.</p></article>
      <article class="research-card reveal"><h3>Decision processes</h3><p>Attention, information processing, numeracy, feedback, attribute order and eye-tracking evidence.</p></article>
      <article class="research-card reveal"><h3>Public health policy</h3><p>Vaccination, mandates, telehealth, preventive care and economic evaluation of health programmes.</p></article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section section-tint" aria-labelledby="recent-heading">
  <div class="page-shell">
    <div class="section-heading-row"><h2 id="recent-heading">Recent publications</h2><a class="text-link" href="/publications/">All publications →</a></div>
    <div class="featured-publications">
      <article class="featured-publication reveal">
<div class="publication-eyebrow">Health Economics, 35, 910–928 · 2026</div>
<h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.70093" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Guidance or Misdirection? Unpacking the Role of Feedback in Health Preference Assessments</a></h3>
<p><strong>Mesfin G. Genie</strong>; Shelby D. Reed; Semra Ozdemir</p>
<span class="status">Published</span>
</article><article class="featured-publication reveal">
<div class="publication-eyebrow">Australian and New Zealand Journal of Public Health, 50, 100496 · 2026</div>
<h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100496" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Community First or My Body First? Moral Values and Vaccine Mandate Preferences</a></h3>
<p><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Fabio I. Martinenghi; Francesco Paolucci; Jonathan Lake; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth; Margie Danchin; Teresa Gavaruzzi; Udo Evers</p>
<span class="status">Published</span>
</article><article class="featured-publication reveal">
<div class="publication-eyebrow">Australian and New Zealand Journal of Public Health, 50, 100450 · 2026</div>
<h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100450" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">No Jab, No Access? Preferences for Vaccine Mandates in Europe and Australia</a></h3>
<p><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Fabio I. Martinenghi; Francesco Paolucci; Jonathan Lake; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth; Jessica Kaufman; Margie Danchin; Jeremy K. Ward; Teresa Gavaruzzi</p>
<span class="status">Published</span>
</article><article class="featured-publication reveal">
<div class="publication-eyebrow">Value in Health, 29, 467–475 · 2026</div>
<h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.10.011" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Priority for Self or Others? Incorporating Equity Considerations in a Preference-Based Health Value Assessment</a></h3>
<p><strong>Mesfin G. Genie</strong>; Surachat Ngorsuraches</p>
<span class="status">Published</span>
</article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section" aria-labelledby="tools-heading">
  <div class="page-shell">
    <div class="section-heading-row"><h2 id="tools-heading">Tools</h2><a class="text-link" href="/tools/">All tools →</a></div>
    <div class="tool-grid">
      <article class="tool-card reveal"><div class="tool-topline"><span>Vaccine policy</span><span class="live-pill">Live</span></div><h3>eMANDEVAL Future</h3><p>Compares prospective vaccine-mandate designs using predicted support, lives saved and benefit-cost outcomes.</p><a class="tool-link" href="/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/" target="_blank">Launch eMANDEVAL ↗</a></article>
      <article class="tool-card reveal"><div class="tool-topline"><span>Farm economics</span><span class="live-pill">Live</span></div><h3>SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</h3><p>Evaluates farm practices and soil-management interventions using NPV, BCR, ROI and sensitivity analysis.</p><a class="tool-link" href="/farming-bca-tool-v18/" target="_blank">Launch SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool ↗</a></article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="contact-strip" aria-labelledby="contact-heading">
  <div class="page-shell contact-strip-inner">
    <div><h2 id="contact-heading">Research and collaboration</h2><p>For research collaboration, doctoral supervision or invited presentations.</p></div>
    <a class="button-primary" href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au">mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au</a>
  </div>
</section>
</main>
```
